__comment__: Common fields configuration - Fields that are common across all object types, and schema reference mappings

Lang_Cd.description: Language/Locale code - common across all objects

Timezone_Cd.description: Timezone code - common across all objects

CountryCode.description: Country code from Code table (CatCd=1006) - use ItmCd value (e.g., 'US', 'CA') - common across all objects

__note__: These fields are automatically available to all object schemas and should not be duplicated in individual schemas. When a field has 'schema_ref' attribute, use the schema_refs mappings to resolve FK. For Code table references, use 'cat_cd_ref' instead.
